info.title: Samax Assets API
info.description:
Samax Assets API

Maintains the 'Stamdata' as it is called at Samax.

It is used by the Assets-Grid application to maintian the data via simple CRUD methods.

It also has models that extend beyond what is in managed by the CRUD operations. These are used internally by directly accessing the database. This is to be changed over time.

There are also methods that extract complete models from the database. These are used to provide data to the Price application. These methods will become depricated over time as all data will be accessed and then stored in the DataCollection application. These models are preceded by the letters DC for DataCollection.
